title: Activated Charcoal Capsules 1800mg
body_html:
What Is Activated Charcoal?

Activated charcoal is very different from the charcoal that is commonly used for barbecues. It is made from a range of natural materials and is used in both conventional and alternative medicine as a means of dealing with toxins. Activated charcoal has the ability to trap unwanted chemicals in the body, preventing their absorption and helping to facilitate their removal.

How Does Activated Charcoal Work?

Although activated charcoal is widely referred to as an absorbent, the mechanism behind its activity in the body is actually a process known as adsorption. During adsorption, gases adhere to the surface of a solid or a liquid to form a thin layer of molecules. The surface of activated charcoal is covered in tiny pores, which are created through a specialised heat-treatment process. This porous surface has a negative charge that attracts the positively charged particles found in the excess gas that sometimes accumulates in the digestive system.

Who Can Benefit from Taking an Activated Charcoal Supplement?

Activated charcoal capsules are popular with people who are looking to target issues such as excessive flatulence. Following ingestion, activated charcoal works to absorb the gas that is sometimes produced after eating a meal.

The results of a study published in the American Journal of Gastroenterology provide evidence to support the efficacy of activated charcoal. The researchers that carried out the experiment concluded that activated charcoal can help prevent excessive intestinal gas following a typical gas-producing meal. According to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), activated charcoal contributes to the reduction of excessive flatulence after eating. The beneficial effect of activated charcoal is obtained with 1g which should be taken at least 30 minutes before and 1g shortly after the meal.

Why Choose Simply Supplements Activated Charcoal Capsules?

Activated charcoal is an effective solution to flatulence and excessive intestinal gas accumulation that is supported by evidence. The EasyGest capsules provide a convenient method of ingesting activated charcoal that doesn't turn a person's mouth black. The Simply Supplements nutrition team decided to add Activated Charcoal 300mg to the product range after considerable research and development. It has been formulated to provide optimal levels of the active ingredient and is manufactured by the supplier to the stringent standards of Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP).


The auditing of all raw materials allows us to trace ingredients right back to their source, and strict quality control procedures ensure the absence of contaminants while supporting the consistent delivery of the specified amount of activated charcoal. All Simply Supplements products are manufactured in the UK, and should you have any queries, our customer service and nutrition advice teams are more than happy to deal with your enquiry.

title: Adult Duck & Rice Cat Food
body_html:
Sensitive Stomach Formula

While our premium duck and rice dry food can be enjoyed by any adult cat, it can be particularly beneficial for cats with a sensitive stomach or other digestive problems. Duck is well-known for its gentle nature in the gut, and 40% of this food is made up from this very ingredient. This has been combined with rice, which is a great source of carbohydrate in the diet for day-long energy levels. Combined, they make for healthy balanced nutrition without the potential stomach upsets caused by other popular ingredients.

Potent Prebiotics to Support the Gut Microbiome

Another issue that can cause digestive issues is an imbalance in gut bacteria. Situations such as sickness, medicine use or even a change of food can all lead to changes to the beneficial gut bacteria that promote healthy digestion. To help counteract this, our duck and rice dry food incorporates beneficial levels of chicory extract. Also sometimes known as "inulin", this ingredient is known to be a "prebiotic" – an ingredient that is indigestible to your cat, but acts as a food source for micro-organisms in the gut. In this way they can grow and flourish, supporting the health of your cat.

Only Good, Honest Ingredients

Many of us have learned over the years that artificial ingredients such as colourings or flavourings can have unwanted effects on your cat's health. This is especially so in cases where sensitive stomachs are involved. Choosing only the finest ingredients, our food has been manufactured with none of these unnatural ingredients. You'll find no flavourings, colourings or preservatives and also no added sugar or salt.

Omega 3 for Skin & Coat

Your cat's skin and coat is an important part of their overall health. To support a glossy coat and supple skin, we've incorporated one of the best-known ingredients among cat-owners in the know: omega 3.

However, it's not just these beneficial oils that can support the health and wellness of your pet. As a supplement company we've been sure to provide a full and balanced range of vitamins and minerals. These include vitamin A (for eye health), vitamin D3 to support a healthy skeleton and of course taurine – an essential amino acid for all domestic cats.

If your cat utilises a litter tray in your home then you may be interested to learn about the yucca plant. Many cat owners over the years have reported that adding yucca to their cat's diet has resulted in less odorous stools. For cats with a sensitive stomach this can be particularly beneficial when it's time to empty the litter tray.

As naturally very clean animals, cats routinely groom themselves throughout the day. Unsurprisingly this can sometimes lead to hairballs, where swallowed hair combines in the digestive tract. This premium cat food has been designed with a multitude of different fibre sources. These help to ease food (and hair) through the digestive system, cutting down the chances of hairballs forming in the first place.

If you're new to feeding dry food to your cat then you may not be aware that the simple act of crunching kibble can be beneficial. Measuring 9mm across and 4mm in height, each piece of kibble is small enough to prevent choking, but large enough to encourage your cat to properly chew their food. As they do so your cat's teeth can be gently and naturally cleaned by the abrasive process. This, in turn, can lead to better dental care for your pet.

The high-quality ingredients mean that you actually need to feed far less at each meal than might be necessary with less nutrient-dense foods. What is Alpha Lipoic Acid?

Alpha Lipoic Acid (ALA) is a fatty acid produced naturally in the body and is found in every single cell of the human body. Specifically, ALA is found in high concentrations in the mitochondria, which are famously known as the 'powerhouse' of cells. It is this cellular machinery which turns carbohydrates, fats and proteins into adenosine triphosphate (ATP) which is the body's sole unit of energy.

Each capsule is also boosted by the presence of riboflavin. Also known as vitamin B2, riboflavin contributes to energy metabolism and helps protect the cells from oxidative stress.

Due to having similar mechanisms, ALA is also popularly taken alongside acetyl l-carnitine, and our customers who take this pairing on a daily basis pay testament to their synergy.

EasyGest capsules, once in the stomach, help to improve the rate of absorption into the bloodstream, quickening the supplements effect.

To further complement our Alpha Lipoic Acid capsules, Simply Supplements use a manufacturing process that has been developed to include some of the best facilities in the country, complete with state-of-the-art machinery to help refine and fortify capsules. title: Anaemia Home Test Kit - SELFCheck
body_html:
Iron deficiency anaemia can be surprisingly common, particularly among women of child-bearing age. Iron deficiency can have a significant impact on one's life, with potential symptoms including tiredness, headaches and even hair loss.

Fortunately, once diagnosed, iron deficiencies are often easily resolved either through the use of iron tablets and/or a change of diet to introduce more iron-rich foods.

The first step is to identify whether such an issue exists. That's exactly what our iron deficiency anaemia home test kit aims to address.

Test in the Privacy of Your Own Home

While your GP will often be happy to offer an iron deficiency test, it is now possible to check for signs of anaemia from the comfort of your own home thanks to this test kit.

Our kit contains everything necessary except for a watch to accurately measure the time it takes for results to develop. Within 10 minutes of taking the test, you should have your results. There is no need to send off samples at all, and once the test is complete, the whole package can be safely disposed of in your household waste.

How the Home Test Kit Works

This home anaemia testing kit uses a small droplet of blood to test for specific biomarkers such as ferritin. Ferritin is a molecule that stores iron within healthy cells, and a small amount is continually released. By checking for the concentration of ferritin in the blood, it is possible to assess your body's current iron status.

Using the test kit is very simple indeed. Start by collecting a small sample using the included sterile lancet. Add the droplet with the specified amount of diluent to the test device and simply wait 10 minutes for the clear test result.

title: Bee Propolis
body_html:
Propolis is a fascinating substance, being naturally produced by bees just like honey. Specifically, bees use the rich resins and saps from evergreen trees to produce propolis. The end result is a material which is roughly 50% resin, 30% beeswax, and 10% essential oils with a small amount of pollen to round it off.

The word "propolis" roughly translates to "at the entrance to the community". Propolis is a crucial substance for bees, and as this name suggests, it is used most commonly in the construction and protection of the hive.

Thanks to the plant-based sources used by bees, propolis is considered to be one the strongest natural sources of bioflavonoids. Little wonder then that health-conscious individuals have been using it since the time of the Ancient Egyptians.

Why Buy Simply Supplements' Bee Propolis?

Our bee propolis capsules are as pure as can be. Firstly, the base ingredients pass through a comprehensive testing process, ensuring they are free from heavy metals, pesticides and more.

Once quality control processes are satisfied, the beneficial elements are carefully extracted. This means we're able to pack more of these nutrients into our capsules than many competing products. Even though each capsule weighs only 820mg, they actually contain the equivalent of 1000mg of bee propolis. This ensures a super-strength dose every time.

Lastly, the bee propolis extract is gently sealed within a gel capsule to ensure maximum freshness during storage, yet rapid dispersal on consumption.

Our bee propolis capsules are manufactured right here in the UK to ensure maximum purity and quality. They contain no added sugar, salt, colours or other additives. In short, our bee propolis is as close to nature as it's possible to be.

title: Bergamot Essential Oil
body_html:
Bergamot oil is extracted from orange trees. With its distinctive citrusy smell, bergamot essential oil has long been popular not just for its scent, but its alleged refreshing, soothing and uplifting properties.

The specific orange tree from which bergamot essential oil is derived - known by the Latin name of Citrus bergamia - is grown around the world in warm climates. However, probably the best-known source of high-quality bergamot oil is Italy. Indeed, it is the northern Italian town of Bergamo that gives bergamot essential oil its unique name.

To ensure only the finest quality essential oil, we also source ours from Italy; specifically from the sunny climate from Sicily.

Our bergamot oil is extracted by cold compression of ripe orange fruit peel. This pure extract then passes through steam distillation to remove any furocoumarins. This distillation process creates a far more refined end product known in the industry by the acronym "FCF". This precision processing renders the end product ideal as a massage oil or for use in homemade fragrances.

title: Blood Glucose Test - SELFCheck
body_html:
Blood glucose levels naturally rise and fall throughout the day in response to the consumption of food and the impact of insulin, among other factors. However, it is when blood sugar levels operate outside this normal range that problems may be experienced. In extreme cases, excessive blood sugar levels may indicate the presence or likelihood of developing diabetes.

Undiagnosed Blood Glucose Concerns

According to Diabetes UK, roughly 850,000 people are unknowingly living with type 2 diabetes today. Symptoms can vary from one individual to another but may include fatigue, excessive thirst and unexplained weight changes.

Individuals over 40 years of age, those with a large waist or a high cholesterol level are at particular risk of blood glucose problems.

Fortunately, the sooner any issues are identified, the easier they typically are to resolve. On the other hand, if you're concerned that you may be a prediabetic but test negative, then you know you can rest easier.

Results from the Comfort of Your Own Home

What could be better than testing your own blood glucose from the comfort of your own home? No more frustration trying to book a medical appointment. No waiting around for a result. Instead, with this blood glucose home test kit from SELFCheck you can experience reliable, easy-to-read results in only 5 minutes.

The Science Behind the Test

Using the blood glucose home test kit couldn't be simpler. All it takes is a drop or two of blood from your finger. Simply dab this blood onto the included test strip, wait five minutes, then compare it with the included colour chart to get your results. Just as importantly, once your test is complete all the equipment can be safely disposed of in your household waste.

title: Bowel Health (FIT) Test - SELFCheck
body_html:

In the case of a positive test, the sooner any issues are identified and treated, the more effective the results are likely to be.

The Science Behind the Test

Blood in the stool is one of the most reliable signs of bowel abnormality. However, in the earliest stages of such conditions, the amount of blood present can be so tiny as to be unnoticed by the human eye.

This home test kit therefore utilises the "faecal immunochemical principle" (FIT) to look for microscopic traces of blood that may warrant further investigation.

Results from the Comfort of Your Own Home

Understandably many people are uncomfortable about discussing bowel health with others. With this FIT home test kit, however, you can receive results from the comfort of your own bathroom within minutes.

This kit has been designed to a sensitivity level exceeding most NHS FIT tests, giving a high level of accuracy.

What is CBD?

Cannabidiol (CBD) is one of the main active ingredients within the Cannabis sativa plant and is extracted from the flowers. Unlike THC, the psychoactive compound within cannabis which stimulates a 'high', CBD is not categorised as a controlled substance by the UK government and therefore can be sold as a food supplement. This is as long as the THC in the plants does not exceed 0.2% and the finished product contains less than 1mg of total THC. This is something our high strength CBD capsules strictly abide by.

The CBD found within our capsules is derived from EU certified Cannabis sativa plants which are 100% natural and non-GMO. These plants also contain the full spectrum of terpenes, flavonoids and phenols to further reinforce the quality of our CBD capsules.

Like all botanical supplements, the cultivation and extraction are of utmost importance. None of the plants used in our CBD capsules have been treated with harmful chemicals or pesticides. Furthermore, the natural compounds have been extracted using the gold standard supercritical CO2 method which protects the delicate qualities of the plant and garners a high yield. Not only that, this advanced methodology is non-toxic and antibacterial, ensuring the capsules are free of impurities.

What Are the Benefits of CBD Capsules?

As I am sure you can imagine we work in a heavily regulated field that has strict laws that we have to diligently follow. At this present time, there are no EU approved health claims for Cannabidiol, and as CBD is not currently licensed as a medicine, we cannot make medicinal claims on our CBD capsules either.

Despite this, we are pleased to report that CBD is legal to buy and use and this exciting natural compound is currently the focus of high-quality scientific trials. These rigorous investigations are currently assessing how CBD interacts with the human endocannabinoid system and the potential applications this could have.

These plants have also not experienced any harmful chemicals or pesticides to ensure they retain their full spectrum of cannabinoids, terpenes, flavonoids and phenols.

We have expertly infused our cannabis extract in MCT coconut oil. Coconut oil is unique due to its specific fatty acid make-up that is rich in medium chain triglycerides (MCTs). These fats are processed quite differently in the body and for that reason, coconut oil has received much attention in scientific circles.

Gold Standard Extraction

The way in which the cannabinoids are extracted from the flowers also impacts the quality of the oil. In stark contrast to the companies which apply solvents such as hexane or butane, our natural CBD oil has been extracted by highly advanced machinery that utilises the supercritical CO2 method.

This is well-known in the industry to be the gold standard method of CBD extraction as it protects the delicate natural qualities of the oil, whilst being non-toxic and antibacterial.

Why Buy CBD Coconut Oil?

Those who follow this contemporary topic closely will certainly realise that we operate in a heavily regulated industry that has strict laws. Due to this, and the fact that there are currently no EU authorised health claims for CBD, there is very little we can say about it at present. For this reason, we encourage you to do your own research so you are able to make an informed decision on whether to buy full spectrum CBD oil.

When looking to buy CBD oil supplements it is important to go with a company that displays the Cannabis Trades Association logo. Only reputable companies who sell safe and legal products can become a member, so this should provide added reassurances to those who are looking to Simply Supplements for their supply of CBD oil.

title: Cedarwood Essential Oil
body_html:
As the name suggests, cedarwood essential oil is extracted from cedar trees. More specifically, our oil is steam distilled from the needles, leaves, bark and berries of the Atlas Cedar.

The Atlas Cedar is so-called because it is native to the Atlas Mountains of Morocco. Vast forests of Atlas Cedar are found in the areas of higher rainfall, allowing great choice when selecting the finest base ingredients for distillation.

After distillation, our cedarwood essential oil is gently poured into coloured glass bottles to ensure it maintains its beneficial properties. Our manufacturer is Sedex-registered, which ensures ethical trade and sustainability are at the core of our essential oil sourcing.

As a member of the pine family, the scent of cedarwood essential oil is naturally warm, sweet and woody. It is believed by many to have uplifting and reviving properties.

It is non-irritating, so can be safely used with an appropriate carrier oil for massages and in skincare routines.

title: Chewable Calcium & Magnesium Tablets
body_html:
Calcium and magnesium are classed as 'macro-minerals', as we need them in relatively large amounts. To make meeting your body's needs as enjoyable as possible, these tablets not only have a fresh tropical flavour but are also chewable. This makes them the perfect option for anyone who struggles to take standard tablets.

Calcium and Magnesium for Bone Health

Calcium is the most abundant mineral in the body. The vast majority of the calcium found in the body is stored in the bones and teeth, but there is also a small amount found in the blood.

Calcium, which is mainly found in dairy foods and green vegetables, is needed for a number of important physiological functions.

Unfortunately, when a person's intake of calcium is insufficient to meet requirements, the body takes calcium from the bones, which can eventually cause them to become porous and weak. This is one of the many reasons why it is important to ensure a daily intake of this essential mineral.

Calcium works in synergy with another essential mineral, magnesium, which is also an important structural component of the skeleton, as it contributes to the maintenance of both bone mass and healthy teeth.

Muscle Function

Both calcium and magnesium support healthy muscle function, as they have important roles in muscle contraction. These minerals are also needed for nerves to effectively deliver messages to and from the brain.

Supporting Energy Levels

Calcium and magnesium are known to support energy production, and the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) has confirmed that magnesium contributes to a reduction in tiredness and fatigue. Due to this, our chewable Calcium 400mg and Magnesium 200mg tablets are widely taken by customers who complain of tiredness, despite getting sufficient sleep.

Scientifically Formulated Calcium and Magnesium Tablets

Just one serving of our chewable Calcium 400mg and Magnesium 200mg supplement is all that is required to meet the Nutrient Reference Values (NRVs) set out by EFSA. This innovative formula provides calcium and magnesium in a 2:1 ratio, which is widely considered to be optimal for synergy between these minerals.

title: Chewable Calcium & Vitamin D3 Tablets
body_html:
Calcium & Vitamin D for Strong Bones & Muscles

Calcium and vitamin D are synonymous with each other due to their complementary roles within the body. Primarily, calcium supports bone density and muscle contraction, whilst vitamin D helps the body absorb this mineral. In this formula, we have included high amounts of calcium alongside vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol), which is the body's preferred form of this nutrient.

As calcium is the most abundant mineral in the body, we require a relatively large amount of it on a daily basis. For this reason, it has gained the tag of a 'macro-mineral'. Because of this, tablets that contain a relevant dose of calcium are notoriously large. Therefore, we have made this tablet chewable, making it easy to consume whilst boasting a delicious orange flavour.

Benefits for All Age Groups

Calcium and vitamin D provide health benefits for all, but they are especially important for children and older adults. In children, these two essential nutrients contribute to normal growth and development.

The European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) also acknowledges that calcium and vitamin D help to reduce bone weakening in post-menopausal women, which can in turn decrease the risk of osteoporosis. To help in this regard, women over the age of 50 are recommended to consume 1,200mg of calcium and 20µg (800iu) of vitamin D per day. As this is difficult to obtain through food alone, a high-quality supplement can certainly be of benefit.

Immune Support

Although vitamin C and zinc are the nutrients which come to mind when seasonal defence is mentioned, vitamin D also has an important role in ensuring the immune system functions normally in both adults and children. As our immune system can often become compromised during the colder, darker months, a vitamin D supplement can help make up for the lack of sunlight exposure.

Premium Quality Guaranteed

Here at Simply Supplements, we continuously strive to provide our customers with the finest products to support their health and wellbeing goals. We make this possible by utilising state-of-the-art, Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities right here in the UK.
Like all of the products in our expanding range, these chewable calcium and vitamin D tablets are made in the UK for complete quality assurance.

title: Chewable Vitamin B12 500µg Tablets
body_html:
What is Vitamin B12?

Despite being required only in tiny amounts, vitamin B12 has a number of crucial roles in our health and wellbeing. Unlike other members of the B vitamin family, B12 can only be found in foods of animal origin. For this reason, many vegetarians and vegans can find themselves suffering from low levels.

A lack of B12 can lead to symptoms such as anaemia, weakness, nerve problems and impaired psychological and cognitive functioning. For these reasons, it is important to consider fortified foods or a high-quality supplement if you do not regularly consume meat, fish, eggs or dairy.

What are the Health Benefits of Vitamin B12?

Vitamin B12 is best known for its role in the production of red blood cells and its ability to support the immune system. As red blood cells carry oxygen-rich blood around the body to help fuel our cells, B12 is also proven to reduce symptoms of tiredness and fatigue.

Vitamin B12 is also revered for its capability in supporting psychological health, the nervous system and maintaining normal homocysteine levels. The aforementioned health claims are all authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

Premium Grade Ingredients within a Tasty Chewable Tablet

At Simply Supplements we always strive to use the finest quality ingredients to provide our customers with the best end product. At our state of the art, Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities; expert scientists have developed these 500µg chewable vitamin B12 tablets to provide high strength nutritional support alongside a delicious burst of flavour.

Like all of the products in our growing range, these 500µg chewable vitamin B12 tablets are manufactured right here in the UK.

Vitamin C is popularly taken to support a healthy immune system and to help defend against oxidative stress. It has also been shown to support the maintenance of healthy blood vessels, skin and gums through its role in collagen formation.

Unfortunately, there are a number of different factors that can negatively impact your body's ability to absorb vitamin C, including age, stress and nicotine. Although chondroitin is a compound found naturally in the body, factors such as advancing age, previous injuries and medical conditions can harm the body's ability to produce it.

Furthermore, food sources of chondroitin are famously scarce and therefore supplementation represents the only viable way to obtain the amount of chondroitin you may desire on a daily basis.

title: Chromium Complex
body_html:
What is Chromium?

Chromium is an essential mineral that we need in tiny amounts to maintain normal bodily functions. It has a central role in the metabolism of the macronutrients, protein, fat and carbohydrates. According to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), chromium is also involved in insulin action and the regulation of blood glucose concentration, which accounts for why it is often taken by people who experience noticeable fluctuations in their blood sugar levels.

Synergistic Formula

Simply Supplements Chromium Complex tablets provide a significant level of chromium picolinate, together with a range of supporting nutrients. These essential vitamins and minerals have been selected for their ability to work in synergy with chromium, but they also have individual health benefits, such as:

  • Zinc – contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism
  • Magnesium – contributes to normal muscle function
  • B Vitamins – contribute to normal protein and glycogen metabolism

All of these claims have been authorised by EFSA.

title: Chromium Picolinate 200µg
body_html:
What is Chromium?

Chromium is a micro-mineral that is silvery white in appearance, and as a nutrient it is considered to be essential for humans, meaning that a regular intake is required. It has a number of established roles in the body, and according to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), contributes to the normal metabolism of macronutrients and the maintenance of healthy blood glucose levels. There are several known food sources of chromium, but the levels found in foods are significantly affected by agricultural practices and the manufacturing processes. As a result, many individuals utilise a chromium supplement to ensure a consistent and adequate intake.

What Are the Benefits of a Chromium Supplement?

As a result of the part it plays in regulating blood sugar levels, chromium is thought to assist in stabilising energy levels, supporting the avoidance of the feelings of lethargy that can follow the consumption of a sugary or high-carbohydrate food. Its role in macronutrient metabolism means that it enables the body to more efficiently use the protein, carbohydrates and fats provided by the diet to produce energy.

Who Should Take Chromium Tablets?

Chromium supplements can be taken by anyone who is concerned about their dietary intake of this vital trace mineral. Our 200mcg Chromium tablets are a popular choice among people who are concerned about maintaining healthy blood sugar levels.

What Are the Advantages of Our Chromium 200µg Tablets?

During development, the nutrition team at Simply Supplements decided to use the picolinate form of chromium in the formulation of these chromium tablets. Chromium picolinate combines chromium with an amino acid complex, and is a proven method of increasing the bioavailability of the active ingredient. The end result of a stringent production process is a tablet that is easy to swallow and is robust enough to maintain its potency during storage and transportation.

A series of strict quality control procedures, including chemical assay, microbial control, component analysis and physical property evaluation, ensure the absence of contaminants and help guarantee the delivery of the specified amount of chromium in every tablet. All Simply Supplements products are manufactured in the UK at Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities using premium-grade materials.

title: Cinnamon Essential Oil
body_html:
Cinnamon essential oil is extracted from a range of tropical evergreen trees from the Cinnamomum genus. Our own cinnamon essential oil comes from Cinnamomum verum, often known by the common names of Sri Lankan Cinnamon, True Cinnamon or Ceylon Cinnamon.

Cinnamomum verum is particularly popular as a base for essential oil extraction as it is believed to have a subtler yet richer scent with more depth than many other versions.

To produce our essential oil, the inner bark of the tree is gently loosened from the living tree. It is then carefully cut away from the stem or branch so that the tree can continue to grow for generations to come.

The oil is then extracted gently using steam to create the highest quality final product possible.

Cinnamon essential oil is incredibly potent and should be used with care. The warm, spicy aroma quickly fills any room when used in a diffuser, but should be diluted with a suitable carrier oil and patch-tested before it is used in massage blends etc.

title: Co-Enzyme Q10 300mg - Ubiquinone
body_html:
What is Co-Enzyme Q10?

Co-Enzyme Q10, which is also widely known as ubiquinone, is a vitamin-like substance that is found in high concentrations in the body's mitochondria. The mitochondria are a crucial part of any cell and are the component that uses energy from carbohydrates, fats and proteins to produce adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the body's energy current.

Unfortunately, the ageing process and other factors such as illness and medication usage can attenuate the body's supply of co-enzyme Q10, which is affectionately known as the body's 'spark plug'. As a result, supplements containing this sought after nutrient are becoming increasingly popular, especially with those who enjoy staying active.

Who Should Take Co-Enzyme Q10 Capsules?

Co-Enzyme Q10 is a hugely popular supplement, particularly in Europe, America and Japan. In order to ensure customers are receiving the best support on the market, Simply Supplements take extra special care with what ingredients are chosen for these co-enzyme Q10 300mg capsules. title: Cod Liver Oil Capsules 550mg
body_html:

Studies have found that omega 3 oils like our cod liver oil supplement can help by supporting normal cholesterol and triglyceride levels whilst also assisting in the regulation of normal blood pressure.

title: Coeliac Test - SELFCheck
body_html:
Gluten intolerance is thought to affect up to one in a hundred of us, but many people unknowingly remain undiagnosed. This can lead to a range of unpleasant symptoms, which may vary from person to person, but can include digestive problems such as swelling, abdominal pain or diarrhoea, tiredness and even dry skin.

Fortunately, once such an intolerance is identified, it is possible to remove gluten from your diet, leading to significant improvements in your quality of life.

What's more, thanks to advances in home test kits, it is possible to identify the likelihood of coeliac disease from the comfort and privacy of your own home.

The Science Behind the Test

The uncomfortable symptoms experienced by gluten intolerant individuals after consuming grain-based foods are a result of inflammation. Quite simply, the body's immune system reacts to the gluten, particularly in and around the small intestine.

When the body launches an immune response, antibodies are produced. This coeliac home test specifically analyses one such antibody known to scientists as tTGA, which is known to be a biomarker for gluten intolerance.

Note that if you have been avoiding gluten in your diet as a result of an assumed intolerance then this home test kit may not pick up tTGA levels effectively. The manufacturer recommends including gluten in your diet for at least 6 weeks prior to testing, to be sure of an accurate result.

Results from the Comfort of Your Own Home

It takes less than five minutes to get the result of your coeliac home test, and everything happens in the comfort of your own home. There is no need to send off a sample in order to receive your results.

Simply add a small drop of blood (easily achieved with the included lancet) to the test strip and wait a few minutes for the colour to develop.

Note that gluten intolerance can run in families, so if you receive a positive result, then you may also wish to consider testing blood relatives too.

Once you have got your results, the whole kit can be safely and legally disposed of in your household waste.

Coenzyme Q10, also known as Ubiquinone, is a vitamin-like substance that is naturally found in the mitochondria of every cell in the human body, and is popularly known as the body's 'spark plug'. Similarly, mitochondria are commonly referred to as the 'powerhouse of the cell', due to their ability to turn the different fats, sugars and protein that you eat into cellular, chemical energy that is then used by the body.

However, the natural ageing process can have a negative impact on the body's ability to maintain healthy Coenzyme Q10 levels. As a result, these high-strength Coenzyme Q10 tablets have been designed by our expert team of nutritionists to help address this potential decline by providing daily, comprehensive doses of Coenzyme Q10.

Intricate machinery allows ingredients to be purified on a molecular level, purifying the nutrients from the risks posed by foreign contaminants.

Fully trained, qualified professionals are on hand at every stage of the manufacturing process to perform stringent tests designed to help prevent imperfections and flaws. Once the final tablets are created, they are tested under extreme conditions and foil-sealed to lock in freshness.

title: Conjugated Linoleic Acid (CLA) Capsules
body_html:
What is CLA?

Conjugated Linoleic Acid (CLA) is the common name for a group of polyunsaturated fatty acids that work in cell membranes. As naturally-occurring free fatty acids, these active forms have been studied for their beneficial effects in numerous scientific trials and have subsequently become a popular addition to a healthy and balanced lifestyle.

Our bodies do not produce CLA, and so we are required to obtain it through our diet. Although Conjugated Linoleic Acid is present in a number of foods, such as eggs, poultry and dairy products, supplements are the only method of achieving the amount of CLA that has been used in rigorous scientific investigations.

Who Should Take Conjugated Linoleic Acid Capsules?

Conjugated Linoleic Acid is primarily suited to those who engage in regular physical activity. However, CLA can be used by anyone who is looking for a versatile addition to their existing supplement regime in order to keep up with their day-to-day lifestyle demands and activities.

Why Buy from Simply Supplements?

The oil used in our Conjugated Linoleic Acid capsules is produced using advanced lipid technology, which serves to maximise the potency of the CLA. Usually, Conjugated Linoleic Acid is naturally found in high-calorie foods, which can counteract many of its beneficial properties. The process of extraction allows the consumer to take advantage of the benefits of CLA without a significant increase in calorie intake.

Activated Charcoal for Whiter Teeth

From applying activated charcoal paste to our teeth, to using an activated charcoal toothpaste, the one thing that most people can agree on is how activated charcoal helps to whiten teeth.

It's believed that this is due to the nature of the particles, which are microscopically pitted. This gives activated charcoal a naturally abrasive effect, gently polishing your teeth.

Now we've added activated charcoal to our DentaSupport Treats to help your cat or dog experience the same impressive benefits.

body_html:
Eucalyptus citriodora is a member of the gum tree family. It is known by a number of different common names including the Southern Blue Gum and the Tasmanian Gum Tree.

Historically, eucalyptus essential oil has been most commonly used to relieve congestion, such as during hayfever season or when suffering from the sniffles. It may be rubbed on the chest when appropriately prepared for natural relief throughout the day.

However, Eucalyptus citriodora also has another common name that reveals a little more about it; namely the Lemon Scented Gum. These fruity citronella tones have also made it popular for keeping mosquitoes at bay on warm summer evenings.

The Lemon Scented Gum from which our eucalyptus essential oil is derived is grown in the tropical climate of Brazil. It is extracted by steam distillation, using the leaves and young twigs of the tree.

The precious oil is then gently packed into tinted glass bottles to preserve its integrity during storage and ensure maximum freshness on arrival.

We make all of our supplements right here in the UK at state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities which are GMP certified and BRC Grade AA rated. We also insist on using the finest ingredients and select ones that work synergistically where possible for maximum effect.

We are also very pleased that this product is suitable for a whole host of customers. It is lactose free and suitable for vegetarians. So, no matter who you are, if you are looking to support your vision then you can put your faith in our innovative and unique formula.

title: EyeWell Plus for Dogs
body_html:
Although dogs don't see the world in the same way as people, one thing that both species have in common is that they experience changes to vision as a result of the ageing process. One sign of deteriorating eyesight can be a reluctance to go outside at night. A progressive decline in visual acuity as a dog gets older is to be expected, and usually does not pose any significant problems.

EyeWell Plus for Dogs has been formulated to provide a dog with the nutrients they need to help ensure that their eyesight lasts them a lifetime. Each convenient sprinkle capsule provides a unique blend of active ingredients that are known to support eye structure and function in dogs.

Maintenance of Normal Vision

Each capsule of EyeWell Plus for Dogs provides beneficial levels of the fat-soluble vitamin A and the trace mineral zinc. Both of these essential nutrients have established roles in supporting the maintenance of normal vision.

Eye Health Support

Lutein is a carotenoid that is naturally concentrated in the macula of healthy eyes. The macula is the area of the eye most responsible for focusing the centre of vision and is an area highly susceptible to age-related macular degeneration. It is widely believed that lutein supplements may support the maintenance of eye health and normal vision.

title: Flaxseed Oil Capsules 3,000mg
body_html:
Benefits of Flaxseed Oil

Flaxseed oil is a source of the essential omega 3 fatty acid called Alpha Linolenic Acid (ALA). In the body, ALA can be converted into Eicosapentaenoic Acid (EPA) and Docosahexaenoic Acid (DHA) which are the omega 3 fats found in oily fish.

Simply Supplements super strong Flaxseed Oil 3,000mg supplement also contains Linoleic Acid (omega 6) and Oleic Acid (omega 9). Like ALA, Linoleic Acid is not produced naturally in the body and therefore it needs to be consumed through diet or supplementation. Simply Supplements Flaxseed Oil 3,000mg supplement is ideally suited to provide high-quality nutrients in a convenient form.

Advanced Manufacturing Techniques for High-Quality Ingredients

The delicate oil within flaxseeds is susceptible to damage from heat and air. To counter this problem, it needs to be extracted using an advanced cold-pressing technique at consistently low temperatures. In order to preserve the nutritional benefits of the oil, this natural process involves no heat or chemicals. Simply Supplements work with outstanding, industry-leading suppliers who have perfected the art of extracting flaxseed oil to help make the Flaxseed 3000mg supplement one of the strongest on the market.

Flaxseed oil is fast becoming a popular choice for people seeking a fish-free source of omega 3. Simply Supplements high strength Flaxseed Oil 3000mg provides a potent omega 3 to omega 6 ratio for general health and wellbeing.

In order to help fortify the ingredients contained in Simply Supplements Flaxseed Oil 3000mg supplement, an advanced manufacturing process is used to purify and refine components. All ingredients are thoroughly purified to eliminate foreign contaminants and toxins that may affect the nutritional quality of the supplement. When packaged, the Flaxseed Oil 3,000mg supplement utilises an easy-to-open, airtight seal that helps to prolong freshness.

All of Simply Supplements products are manufactured by our suppliers in the UK in accordance with the strict quality standards and regulations outlined by the Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP).

title: Floradix Liquid Iron Formula
body_html:
Iron plays a number of important roles in the body. It is best known as being central to the formation of red blood cells, which in turn transport oxygen around the body. Low iron levels can put this delicate and complex process at risk, leading to feelings of tiredness and fatigue.

However, iron is also involved in a range of other bodily processes. For example, it contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism as well as supporting a healthy immune system.

It is therefore worrying to report how many people are consuming insufficient quantities of this mineral. This situation is impacted by the difficulties absorbing dietary iron in some people, particularly more mature individuals.

Many people therefore opt to supplement their diet with additional iron to avoid the risk of deficiency.

This liquid iron formula ensures that the beneficial mineral is absorbed quickly and easily through the lining of the digestive system. This base ingredient is supported by the addition of vitamin C, which according to EFSA increases iron absorption. Vitamins B6 and B12 add further to this formula, contributing to normal red blood cell formation as well as the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

Lastly, a unique fruit formula has been added to ensure a pleasant taste every time.

title: Folic Acid 400mcg
body_html:
Essential Support for Conception and Pregnancy

Folic acid, also known as vitamin B9, is a key nutrient that supports overall health. It is particularly important for women who are planning to conceive or in the early stages of pregnancy. Supplemental folic acid intake increases maternal folate status, which is crucial, as low maternal folate status is a risk factor in the development of neural tube defects in the developing foetus. To achieve this beneficial effect, a daily 400µg folic acid supplement is recommended for at least one month before and up to three months after conception.

Why Take Folic Acid Tablets?

Maintaining adequate folic acid levels is essential for women who are pregnant or trying to conceive, but it can also be a valuable addition to a well-rounded diet. As folic acid is a water-soluble vitamin, the body does not store large amounts, meaning a regular intake is needed. While some foods naturally contain folate, it can be difficult to achieve the recommended levels through diet alone. Taking a folic acid supplement provides a reliable and convenient way to ensure you are getting the right amount each day, supporting maternal folate status when it matters most.

Easy-to-Take Daily Support

Each tablet provides the recommended 400µg dose of folic acid in a small, easy-to-swallow format, making it simple to incorporate into your daily routine.

Quality You Can Trust

Our folic acid 400µg supplement is manufactured in the UK to Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) standards, ensuring high quality and safety. Each tablet provides the recommended dose in a small, easy-to-take format. Plus, with our PriceMatch guarantee, you can enjoy premium-quality folic acid tablets at great value.

title: Frankincense Essential Oil
body_html:
Frankincense has been renowned for thousands of years for its rich, woody scent. Indeed, even the name frankincense purportedly derives from the French for "high-quality incense".

Now, thanks to modern production techniques, the same quality of essential oil is available at a cost that is affordable to us all.

Frankincense comes from the Boswellia carterii tree, which grows throughout much of Africa, India and the Middle East. Our frankincense essential oil is derived from Boswellia trees grown in Somalia, while our manufacturer is Sedex-registered, which ensures sustainable collection practices and ethical trade with local growers.

Unlike many other essential oils, which are extracted from the leaves of the plant, frankincense has an altogether more intriguing origin.

Frankincense essential oil begins its life as the resin from the Boswellia tree. In order to create frankincense, the trees are tapped, just like maple trees are tapped for their syrup. This is a very manual process and can only begin once the trees reach some eight to ten years of age.

The resin hardens on contact with the air, at which point it is removed and steam-distilled to produce the final oil. Interestingly, frankincense essential oil is also sometimes known as "Olibanum".

title: Geranium Essential Oil
body_html:
Our geranium essential oil is extracted from the Pelargonium graveolens plant. As a group, there are over 280 recognised members of the Pelargonium family spread across the world.

Pelargonium graveolens is originally an African species, found growing naturally in areas such as South Africa, Zimbabwe and Mozambique. It possesses dainty pink flowers and grows up to 4 feet in height. However, thanks to its popularity and diverse array of uses it is now cultivated around the world. It may even be purchased as a tender garden plant here in the UK.

What makes Pelargonium graveolens so valuable is revealed by its common name: the rose-scented geranium. The essential oil from rose-scented geraniums has long been used in fragrance production and, it is considered by many to be one of the most important ingredients in the industry.

Besides its use to create delicate floral fragrances, soaps and other cosmetics, it has long been popular for aromatherapy.

Our geranium essential oil originates from Egypt, where it is extracted by steam distillation before bottling and transportation to our warehouse. Our manufacturer is a registered member of the International Federation of Aromatherapy to ensure the finest quality oil every time.

title: Ginger Essential Oil
body_html:
The spicy, fresh aroma of ginger has long been popular as an essential oil. Uplifting and warming, it has all manner of potential uses, from diffusers to massage oil mixes (when used with an appropriate carrier oil).

Ginger derives its name from the Greek word "zingiberis" which means "horn-shaped", describing the root of the plant.

Our ginger essential oil is extracted from the Zingiber officinale plant, often known by the English name of Jamaican ginger. The oil is gently extracted by steam distillation from the dried, ground ginger root, which is grown in India under sustainable conditions.

Our trusted manufacturer is a member of the Aromatherapy Trade Council, helping to ensure the highest quality oils are produced every time using best-in-class production facilities.

Ginger essential oil is considered to be highly potent, so care should be taken if using it on the skin. A suitable carrier oil is crucial, and a patch test is recommended, particularly among those with more sensitive skin.

Ginger root is world renowned for its culinary uses, aromatic smell and strong flavour. This delicious and highly popular spice was first discovered over 5 millenniums ago in Asia, but has since become a regular in kitchens all over the world.

Due to the wide range of active ingredients that naturally occur within ginger root, this spice has been subject to fascinating research that has explored its ability to provide a range of benefits.

Ginger is arguably best known for its ability to support digestive health and wellbeing during travel. body_html:
What are the Benefits of Ginkgo & Ginseng?

These two botanical extracts have grown to be so popular because of their benefits to health. Ginkgo is best known for its ability to support circulation to both the brain and the extremities. Through this mechanism, ginkgo supports mental performance, vision and hearing, especially in older adults.

Ginseng is best known for its role as an 'adaptogen', invigorating the body. This helps us maintain optimal stamina, feelings of physical wellbeing and the ability to deal with stress. Ginseng is also thought to support a healthy immune system and, like ginkgo, assist with cognitive functioning.

To complement this duo, our nutrition experts have included a source of iron and vitamin B6 in every tablet. Iron is known for supporting oxygen transport in the body, whilst vitamin B6 supports psychological function and helps to reduce symptoms of tiredness and fatigue.

What are Ginkgo Biloba and Korean Ginseng?

Ginkgo Biloba and Korean Ginseng are herbal extracts taken from different species of trees that have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The Ginkgo Biloba tree is one of the oldest living species of tree in the world and has consequently earned the title of a "living fossil". Ginkgo Biloba supplements have now become some of the most widely used herbal supplements in the UK.

Ginseng is a species of tree native to areas of North America and Asia. Korean ginseng, otherwise known as Panax ginseng, is believed to have been grown commercially in China and Korea since the 16th century.

Like its synergistic partner ginkgo biloba, Korean ginseng is renowned for its powerful natural properties. Simply Supplements has teamed up with industry-leading suppliers and manufacturers to provide this super combination in high-quality tablet form.

body_html:
What is Glucomannan Fibre?

Glucomannan is a fibre that comes from the root of the konjac plant. It is naturally-occurring and is readily used in a variety of medicines and food supplements which, according to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), support healthy weight loss efforts, when paired with an energy restricted diet*.

When glucomannan fibre enters the stomach it absorbs very large amounts of water, increasing the feeling of fullness, which subsequently decreases appetite.

However, glucomannan fibre is almost 50 times more absorbent than wheat bran, so you have to drink 1-2 glasses of water alongside each dose in order to help lose weight in a healthy way.

The carotenoid lycopene is another heavily researched nutrient within HealthShield Antioxidant Formula and is often associated with tomatoes, given that we typically get most of our lycopene through tomato consumption.

Widely known as vitamin B2, riboflavin also contributes to the maintenance of normal vision. The aforementioned health claims have been authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

Premium Quality Guaranteed

Here at Simply Supplements, we work diligently to provide our customers with the finest products to help them achieve their lifestyle goals. This is made possible by utilising state-of-the-art, Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities and the finest quality ingredients.

title: Hemp Oil Capsules 2000mg
body_html:
What is Hemp Oil?

Derived from the seeds of the Cannabis sativa plant, our hemp oil is cold-pressed to retain its natural qualities before being transformed into easy-to-take soft gel capsules. It contains a unique blend of beneficial fatty acids, including essential omega-3 and omega-6, along with omega-9, as well as naturally occurring phytochemicals and added vitamin E for extra support.

Omega-3 and omega-6 are essential polyunsaturated fats that the body cannot produce on its own, so they must be obtained through the diet. Omega-9, a monounsaturated fat commonly found in olive oil, is also present, contributing to hemp oil's distinctive profile. Thanks to this balanced composition, hemp oil is a popular choice for those looking to support their intake of healthy fats and overall wellbeing.

The Difference Between Hemp Oil and CBD Oil

Hemp Oil and Cannabidiol (CBD) Oil originate from the same plant but are very different in composition and use. Hemp Oil is extracted from the seeds and does not contain cannabinoids, but is valued for its nutritional content. In contrast, CBD Oil is extracted from the plant's leaves and flowers and contains a full spectrum of cannabinoids, such as cannabidiol (CBD) and cannabidiolic acid (CBD-a), but neither product has addictive or psychoactive effects.

Why Buy Hemp Oil from Simply Supplements?

Like all supplements in our growing range, these Hemp Oil 2000mg capsules are manufactured in the UK at facilities that meet Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) standards. This ensures every product meets high-quality and safety expectations. Additionally, we are proud members of the Cannabis Trades Association, working alongside others in the industry to promote the safety, legality and efficacy of hemp-based products.

Support your daily routine with our High Strength 1500mg Omega 3 capsules, carefully formulated to provide EPA and DHA, omega-3 fatty acids found in fish oil.

EPA and DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart. DHA also contributes to the maintenance of normal brain function and normal vision.

Premium-Quality Fish Oil

The fish oil used in our High Strength Omega 3 capsules is sourced from carefully selected suppliers, with fish oil from the deep, cold waters of the Southern Pacific Ocean.

These waters are governed by strict fishing regulations designed to help manage fish stocks responsibly. Our fish oil is carefully processed and quality checked to provide a consistent source of EPA and DHA.

All of our products are manufactured in the UK at Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities.

*The beneficial effect for normal heart function is obtained with a daily intake of 250mg EPA and DHA.

**The beneficial effects for normal brain function and normal vision are obtained with a daily intake of 250mg DHA.

(SKUs: E946 / E947 / E748 / E748B / S749)

title: Hyaluronic Acid 400mg with Vitamin C 320mg
body_html:
Support for Skin and Connective Tissue Health

Hyaluronic acid occurs naturally in the body and is known for its role in maintaining skin structure and joint lubrication. However, levels decline with age, which can affect the appearance and flexibility of skin as well as the comfort of joints.

Our high-strength hyaluronic acid is produced using a gentle fermentation process that protects the integrity of the molecule and ensures a consistent, high-quality extract. Each capsule delivers 100mg of hyaluronic acid, combined with 80mg of vitamin C – a nutrient that contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of skin, cartilage, bones, gums and blood vessels.

This convenient daily supplement is designed to complement your existing skincare or mobility routine and is suitable for both beauty and wellness-focused goals.

Quality You Can Trust

Our formula is made in the UK using premium-grade ingredients and manufactured to strict GMP standards. We use fast-releasing HPMC capsules that are suitable for vegetarian and vegan diets.

Whether you're supporting your skin, joints or overall wellbeing, this simple daily addition can help you stay on top of your health from within.

title: Hyaluronic Acid Capsules 200mg
body_html:
What is Hyaluronic Acid 200mg?

Hyaluronic acid is quickly growing in popularity thanks to findings from exciting scientific investigations. Even though hyaluronic acid is naturally synthesised in the body, production of this compound can gradually decline with age. As a result of this, supplementing with hyaluronic acid is becoming extremely popular, especially with those of us who enjoy an active lifestyle.

Each hyaluronic acid capsule provides three nutrients that are deemed essential to health and have a role in supporting the condition of the joints. Manganese contributes to the maintenance of healthy bones, whilst a fellow mineral copper supports the formation of connective tissue.

Vitamin C has also been included due to its role in collagen synthesis, which supports the function of joint cartilage. These are health claims that have been authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

Should I Take Hyaluronic Acid Capsules?

Simply Supplements high strength Hyaluronic Acid 200mg capsules can provide support to all customers seeking a suitable food supplement to support active living by maintaining joint health. Hyaluronic acid therefore tends to be most popular with mature adults who are experiencing a natural deterioration to hyaluronic acid levels.

Our customers also regularly inform us that they feel their best when taking hyaluronic acid alongside glucosamine. Be sure to browse our extensive range of glucosamine formulas to choose the right one for you and your lifestyle.

EasyGest Capsules for Added Benefit

The resident team of nutrition specialists here at Simply Supplements have designed an innovative system to provide fast and effective digestion using the capsules themselves, as well as the high-quality ingredients they contain.

The 2 piece capsules are ideal for customers who struggle to ingest capsules or tablets orally. The capsules can be split apart and the contents added to food and drink, helping to eliminate the distress of taking supplements whilst still being able to take full advantage of the benefits of high strength Hyaluronic Acid capsules. Once in the stomach, the capsules help to breakdown the hyaluronic acid ingredients, improving the rate of absorption into the bloodstream.

Simply Supplements manufactures all its products in the UK and adheres to the very high standards set by Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP).

A Powerful Blend of Premium Ingredients

Zinc and selenium have also been included in the formulation to provide an additional level of defence and vitamin B6 has been added to further support energy levels.

Crafted to the Highest Standard

Formulated with precision by our team of expert nutritionists, these gummies are a result of meticulous planning and dedication to your wellbeing. Manufactured in facilities certified under Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP), our Immunity Support Gummies meet the highest standards of quality and purity.

body_html:
Trio of Immune-Supporting Nutrients

Our immune system requires a number of nutrients to function as it should, and three of the most important are vitamin C, vitamin D and zinc. This one-a-day formula conveniently provides these three essential micronutrients in high amounts.

Supplements containing this trio are very popular for a number of reasons. Firstly, vitamin C cannot be stored in the body, so needs to be consumed daily for optimal health. Secondly, zinc and vitamin D have been highlighted as nutrients of concern, given that the latest research shows many people are not getting a sufficient amount.

Crafted to the Highest Standard

title: ImmunoBoost Tablets with Black Garlic - SimplyBest
body_html:
What is Immunoboost?

ImmunoBoost is an advanced formula that has been developed to offer immune support and cholesterol control. Each tablet provides a synergistic combination of nutrients that are understood to defend the body against oxidative stress, reduce its susceptibility to colds and flu, and favourably alter blood lipid profile and blood pressure.

Vitamin C

Also known as ascorbic acid, vitamin C is an essential water-soluble vitamin that has a number of well-established roles in the body. According to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), it contributes to:

  • Normal immune function
  • Normal collagen formation
  • Normal psychological and nervous system functioning
  • The reduction of tiredness and fatigue
  • Energy yielding metabolism
  • The protection of cells from oxidative stress

Zinc

Zinc is a trace mineral that is an essential component of the diet. The symptoms that result from a deficiency of zinc are wide-ranging and include impaired immune function. EFSA say that zinc contributes to the maintenance of health in the following contexts:

  • Immunity
  • Fertility and reproduction
  • Metabolism of other nutrients
  • Cell division
  • Growth of hair, skin and nails
  • Vision

Black Garlic

Black garlic is produced through a specialised process of ageing and fermentation, during which fresh garlic loses its characteristic and often undesirable odour and taste, but retains its active ingredients and even gains additional nutritional value. The benefits of a black garlic supplement include:

  • Maintenance of healthy cholesterol levels
  • Antioxidant protection
  • Immune support
  • Reduced inflammation
  • Circulatory health

Why Choose Simply Supplements ImmunoBoost?

This advanced formula has been developed to offer maximum immune and cholesterol support and is manufactured in the UK by our supplier to meet the high standards outlined by Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP). A stringent and comprehensive quality control protocol has been implemented that spans the entire production process of every single batch. Repeated testing at each stage of manufacturing, from the sourcing of raw materials to the production of the finished tablets, and methods of analysis that have been approved by internationally recognised bodies, resulting in a premium quality product that always delivers the stated dosage. The use of blister packaging further protects the integrity of the tablets and makes for a convenient product that is easy to store and carry around.

title: Iron 14mg
body_html:
Highly Absorbable Iron for Daily Vitality

Iron is one of the body's most important minerals, and yet it's also one of the most common dietary shortfalls.

Our Iron 14mg tablets provide this vital nutrient in a highly absorbable form, supplying the recommended daily amount for healthy adults in just one convenient serving.

Why Choose Our Iron 14mg?

Iron is a key component of haemoglobin, the protein in red blood cells that carries oxygen throughout the body. By ensuring your cells receive the oxygen and nutrients they need, iron supports normal energy levels and helps keep you feeling active and alert.

Iron also contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism, the normal function of the immune system, and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue, making it an essential nutrient for overall wellbeing.

Who Can Benefit from Taking an Iron Supplement?

A supplement is a convenient and reliable means of ensuring an adequate intake of iron, and Simply Supplements Iron 14mg can be taken by anyone who is concerned about getting enough of this important mineral. Iron is lost through menstruation, and there is evidence to suggest that a significant percentage of adult women in the UK do not consume adequate iron on a daily basis.

The best sources of iron in the diet are primarily animal foods, and consequently, vegetarians may be at a greater risk of developing iron deficiency. Simply Supplements Iron 14mg is suitable for those on a vegetarian diet, and can be used by this population group to safeguard against an insufficient intake.

As we age, there is a gradual decrease in the efficiency of our digestive systems, and elderly people can sometimes find it difficult to maintain a satisfactory iron status, even if their diet is rich in iron. Simply Supplements Iron 14mg provides iron in a highly bioavailable form, and can be used by seniors to maintain healthy iron levels.

Why Choose Simply Supplements?

Simply Supplements uses only the finest ingredients, and all our products are manufactured in the UK by our supplier to the stringent standards outlined by the Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP). Each of our small, and easy-to-swallow Iron 14mg tablets provides 100% of the Nutrient Reference Value (NRV), and this product is suitable for vegetarians. Simply Supplements Iron 14mg is made with state-of-the-art machinery, using advanced methods of integrated blending and compaction. Thorough auditing and quality control procedures at every stage of manufacturing allow us to consistently produce premium-quality supplements at affordable prices.

title: Juniperberry Essential Oil
body_html:
Juniper is an evergreen conifer that is reputed to have the largest geographical range of any woody plant. Our juniperberry essential oil is extracted from the berries of the Juniperus communis tree, more often known as the common juniper. This impressive tree can reputedly live for over 200 years, producing new fruits every year.

It is these "berries" - which resemble blue-black pine cones - from which the essential oil is extracted. While juniper may be found across a large number of countries, we utilise only trees from Italy, which are believed by many to produce a superior end product.

Our manufacturer, which is Sedex registered to ensure sustainable harvesting, uses steam distillation of the juniper berries to produce the finished oil.

As one might expect of the oil from a conifer tree, the scent is sweet, woody and fresh, helping to bring the sensation of nature into your home and encouraging calm.

title: Korean Ginseng Tablets 4,000mg
body_html:
What is Korean Ginseng?

Ginseng is a species of plant native to parts of North America and Asia. Korean ginseng, otherwise known as Panax ginseng, is known to have been grown commercially in China and Korea since the 16th century, where it was used in traditional herbal medicine. Today, however, it is popularly used the world over in food supplements thanks to the benefits it can have for our health and wellbeing.

What are the Benefits of Korean Ginseng?

Korean ginseng is one of the most famous adaptogens, as it is a herb that can help invigorate the body, which supports mental and physical wellbeing as well as our ability to combat the stressors we encounter. Ginseng also supports the production of T cells which are vital components of the immune system. Therefore, ginseng supports our ability to keep illnesses and infections at bay.

To further boost the effectiveness of these high-strength tablets, our nutrition team has incorporated zinc and vitamin B6 into the formula. The trace mineral zinc is required for healthy cognitive functioning and the immune system, whilst vitamin B6 works to help reduce tiredness and fatigue.

Tested and Perfected for Maximum Quality

These high-quality ginseng tablets represent one of the strongest standardised ginseng extracts on the market. Each extract is taken from only mature Korean ginseng plants, which ensures the highest possible levels of quality. The standardisation techniques employed during production ensure that each tablet provides a consistently high level of natural compounds.

By using standardised extracts, the 40mg used in each tablet is equivalent to around 2,000mg of whole ginseng. The nature of standardised extracts allows for better control of the ingredients without the risk of losing or destroying any of the content, a risk that is often more prominent when lower-quality extracts are used, like in other ginseng supplements you might find elsewhere on the market.

Our streamlined, state-of-the-art manufacturing process allows us to offer extremely good value for money. Simply Supplements Korean Ginseng tablets are manufactured in the UK in some of the most advanced facilities in the country. At these Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities, nutritional experts conduct in-depth tests and samplings at every stage of production to ensure that your supplements are free from potential contaminants. This guarantees that the carefully crafted formula remains as pure and nutrient-rich as possible.

title: KSM-66® Ashwagandha 600mg
body_html:
Ashwagandha for Mental Wellbeing

Sometimes known as Indian ginseng, Ashwagandha has long been used in Traditional Indian Medicine (Ayurveda). However thanks to scores of published studies highlighting its array of benefits, Ashwagandha is now a popular supplement world-over. The majority of research has used 600mg of Ashwagandha daily – the exact specification of this supplement.

Like Korean ginseng and Rhodiola Rosea, Ashwagandha is best known for its adaptogenic potential. Adaptogens work to assist the body during periods of mental stress and anxiety. For this reason, Ashwagandha is a firm favourite with those who are looking to relax and support their psychological wellbeing.

KSM-66® - The World's Best Ashwagandha

Ashwagandha is the only ingredient that Ixoreal (the company who cultivate and extract KSM-66®) work with. Their market-leading extraction method known as 'green chemistry', which preserves all the natural qualities of the botanical, took 14 years to perfect. Their extracts are 100% root – no leaves. This is because the roots possess the highest concentration of active ingredients to provide the best support to customers.

Their Ashwagandha plants grow in the fields of Rajasthan in India, which provide the perfect climate to grow the finest, most nutrient-dense Ashwagandha. As well as having full traceability, the roots are processed in Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities which adhere to Good Packaging Practices (GPP). Again, this diligence ensures customers receive the highest quality supplement and supports the tag of The World's Best Ashwagandha.

title: L-Arginine Capsules 500mg
body_html:
What is L-Arginine?

L-Arginine makes up one part of the 21 amino acids that is used by the human body as a building block to create proteins.

Specifically, arginine has been heavily researched in recent years due to its interaction with nitric oxide, an important compound in the body. Because of this, L-arginine supplements have become highly popular not only with athletes and fitness enthusiasts, but also with older adults who would like to remain sexually active.

Who Benefits from Taking L-Arginine Capsules?

Although present in foods such as red meat and poultry, many prefer to take L-arginine in supplement form. This helps the body receive regular and consistent high-strength dosages.

L-Arginine capsules can be helpful for both male and female customers, and supplements can make a great dietary addition for those who would like to support their active lifestyle.

Quality Guaranteed

Our supplements contain only the highest-quality ingredients encased within a 2-piece EasyGest capsule, which can be taken whole or pulled apart and added to drinks for easier consumption. We also take pride in the fact that our l-arginine supplement has been developed by our resident team of nutrition experts.

This is complemented by the use of some of the best manufacturing facilities in Europe, as our supplements are produced using highly advanced, state-of-the-art machinery and methods. Our products are also rigorously analysed at every step of the manufacturing process to ensure each tablet or capsule is free from foreign contaminants. This gives our customers confidence that they are receiving the highest-quality support available.

title: L-Choline
body_html:
Essential Nutrient

Although we can produce some choline ourselves, we cannot make enough to meet our needs and therefore, it is essential we get it through our diets.

As many people are moving towards a plant-based diet, there are growing concerns that we will not meet our choline requirements, given that the best sources are meat and egg yolks. Because of this, nutrition experts in the UK have advised the Department of Health to provide a reference intake value, like they do with vitamins and minerals.

In the US, depending on life stage, a choline intake of between 450mg and 550mg per day is recommended.

The Benefits of Choline

Choline is vital for numerous reasons. Firstly, it acts as a precursor to phosphatidylcholine and sphingomyelin, two major components of cell membranes. It is also needed to produce the all-important neurotransmitter acetylcholine.

Aside from this, it supports normal liver function and fat metabolism. Choline is very similar to B vitamins and is often grouped with them, like B6, B12 and folate, it contributes to normal homocysteine metabolism. As you can appreciate, it is an important nutrient that is only just starting to get the attention it deserves.

Why Choose Our Choline Capsules?

Our Choline capsules are stronger than most on the market as they provide 500mg of active choline per serving, not 500mg of choline bitartrate. Make sure you check the ingredients list carefully and choose a supplement that provides a high amount of active choline. If a supplement doesn't list the amount of active choline it provides, it is safe to assume it's not going to be strong.

Our choline capsules are also made right here in the UK at Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) approved facilities. Here, all of the raw materials are analysed for quality and purity upon arrival and no batch leaves without meeting the highest nutraceutical testing standards.

title: L-Lysine for Cats 500mg
body_html:
Protein consists of 22 different amino acids. Of these, cats are able to synthesise 12 amino acids at a rate to meet their requirements. The remaining 10 are termed essential amino acids and must be present in the diet in order to satisfy a cat's needs.

VitaPaws™ lysine provides 500mg of L-lysine, which many pet owners believe to be an amino acid that is of particular importance to cats.

Support for the Maintenance of Feline Health

VitaPawsTM L-Lysine 500mg offers a safe and cost-effective method of ensuring an adequate intake of L-Lysine, which is commonly chosen for its alleged role in the maintenance of feline health.

Easy to Use

The use of sprinkle capsules allows for the active ingredients to be easily added to the cat's food, helping them to meet their requirements for this essential amino acid.

title: L-Taurine 1200mg
body_html:
Muscle Growth and Repair

L-Taurine is the active form of one of the 20 amino acids that the body needs to produce the proteins used for the growth and repair of muscles and other tissues. Athletes who consume insufficient amino acids may suffer a loss of muscle mass and a compromised ability to benefit from training.

Popular Supplement

Taurine is considered a conditional amino acid, meaning that although the human body has the ability to synthesise it for itself, under some circumstances it must be supplied through the diet or in supplement form.

Quality-Assured L-Taurine Capsules

Simply Supplements 1200mg L-Taurine capsules are manufactured in the UK to the stringent standards of quality outlined by Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP). The use of patented EasyGest capsules helps to ensure the efficient delivery of the active ingredients.

body_html:

This premium quality formula benefits from being grain-free and naturally hypoallergenic providing a minimum of 37% chicken and 27% rice, while also being rich in other functional ingredients. As well as being free from artificial additives or preservatives, this food comes in the perfect kibble size for large adult dogs.

As well as naturally occurring vitamins and minerals, this food has been fortified to ensure that your dog gets all the nourishment it requires for optimal health.

Because of the quality and extensive nature of the formula, each daily serving provides antioxidant compounds and nutrients to also help immunity and digestion.
