title: Lavender Essential Oil 40/42
body_html:
Lavender is perhaps the best-known essential oil of all, needing very little introduction. The floral, woody scent has been used for generations to encourage relaxation and deep sleep.

Indeed, lavender is named after the Latin word "lavere", meaning "to wash" because the Romans reportedly added it to their bathing water to unwind at the end of the day.

However, there's rather more to producing lavender essential oil than you might initially realise.

There are two main constituents of lavender that are believed to directly impact not just the scent but also the beneficial properties. These go by the names of "linalool" and "linalyl", but levels may vary between plants depending on growing conditions, processing methods and more.

The highest-quality lavender essential oils, like ours carefully blend these two constituents to ensure an identical ratio in every bottle. This is sometimes known within the industry as a "40/42" blend.

Lavender 40/42 is considered superior because of how consistent and reliable it is to use. This perfect balance between linalool and linalyl also makes it the ideal option for those looking to use lavender oil in cosmetics.

The lavender we use in our lavender essential oil is grown in France to the highest standards, with a focus on sustainable growing practices and minimal environmental impact.

title: Lemon Essential Oil
body_html:
Lemon essential oil is produced from the waxy outer layer of the lemon's skin. Our manufacturer uses cold compression to gently extract the powerful oils. The resultant liquid is then carefully packaged into tinted glass bottles to maintain its integrity during storage and transportation.

While lemons are grown in many areas of the world with a Mediterranean climate, our lemon essential oil comes from citrus farms in Sicily, southern Italy.

Our manufacturer is a member of the International Federation of Aromatherapy, ensuring the finest quality base ingredients and a reliable end product every time.

The lemon essential oil has a light and fresh scent, providing hints of spring.

Lemon is considered one of the more potent essential oils. While it can be used in diffusers without limit, it is generally advised that if applying it directly to the skin, it should be suitably diluted with a carrier oil beforehand and patch-tested.

title: Lemongrass Essential Oil
body_html:
Lemongrass essential oil has a deliciously zingy and uplifting aroma that is stimulating and energising. It is also allegedly a very effective insect repellent if used in a diffuser on warm summer evenings due to its high citronella content.

Our lemongrass essential oil comes from the Cymbopogon flexuosus plant, commonly known as East Indian lemongrass. Lemongrass is typically grown across much of Asia, and can reach a height of 2 metres.

Lemongrass essential oil is extracted using steam distillation of the fresh leaves and stems. The resultant oil is then carefully packed into tinted glass bottles to maintain its valuable properties.

With the raw materials for our essential oils being sourced from around the globe, we've been mindful to work closely with a Sedex-registered supplier. This means that great effort is made to ensure sustainable production processes are used, and also that ethical trade guidelines are followed.

title: Lutein 30mg
body_html:
What is Lutein?

Lutein is a carotenoid (fat-soluble pigment) that is naturally found in the macula of the eye.

The macula is the most visually sensitive part of the eye, and is a colour pigment that functions like a light filter. Unfortunately, lutein levels can often decrease with age. As a result, it is important to ensure an adequate dietary intake through foods such as spinach, broccoli and eggs. That being said, lutein supplements are becoming increasingly popular to ensure a high-quality and potent daily supply of lutein.

Should I Take Lutein Capsules 30mg?

The team of expert nutritionists at Simply Supplements has formulated these high-strength Lutein capsules to provide comprehensive daily support. Since age can often have a serious impact on the body's ability to produce lutein, these supplements may be ideally suited to customers around the age of 40 who may have begun to experience a decrease in levels.

In addition to lutein, the formula includes vitamin A and riboflavin (vitamin B2), both of which are known to contribute to the maintenance of normal vision. Riboflavin also helps protect cells from oxidative stress, supporting general wellbeing. Together, these nutrients offer targeted support for eye health and are particularly well-suited for adults looking to maintain healthy vision as part of their daily routine.

Premium-Grade Ingredients Using Exclusive EasyGest Capsules

Simply Supplements has gone to great lengths to source high-quality lutein to help provide as much support as possible. Industry-leading suppliers are used to source incredibly pure and potent Lutein ingredients, which have been thoroughly audit-tested to guarantee only the finest are used in manufacturing.

Simply Supplements utilises a manufacturing process that incorporates state-of-the-art machinery, helping to support ingredient quality and maximise the potential benefits on offer. Advanced cleaning and distilling methods are used to remove foreign contaminants, and fully trained professionals with decades of experience are on hand to perform stringent quality control checks.

All Lutein 30mg capsules are packaged and foil-sealed to lock in freshness, and use an easy-to-open, airtight seal to help preserve their quality.

These high-strength Lutein capsules are manufactured in the UK and are fully compliant with the standards set by the Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP).

Magnesium is an essential mineral that plays a critical role in maintaining overall health and vitality. Primarily found in the bones and muscles, magnesium contributes to normal muscle function and normal functioning of the nervous system..

While it's ideal to obtain magnesium from the diet, some individuals may benefit from supplements to meet their daily needs, particularly if their diet lacks sufficient magnesium-rich foods or if specific health conditions require additional support.

title: Magnesium Citrate Tablets 700mg
body_html:
The Power of Magnesium

Magnesium is a macro-mineral, which means it is required in relatively large amounts. The human body does not have the capacity to synthesise magnesium from other precursors, making it an essential nutrient that can only be provided by the diet.

Food sources of magnesium include green leafy vegetables, nuts, brown rice, wholegrain bread, fish, meat, and dairy products. Supplements are a great way to ensure an adequate intake of magnesium as part of a balanced diet.

Why Choose Our Magnesium Citrate 700mg?

Magnesium citrate is a salt form of magnesium that pairs the mineral with citric acid, resulting in a highly bioavailable source of this essential nutrient.

✓ Contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue
✓ Contributes to electrolyte balance and muscle function
✓ Contributes to normal psychological function
✓ Contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and teeth

Formulated by in-house nutritionists with over 20 years of experience and produced in GMP-certified UK facilities, this potent supplement offers outstanding quality and performance you can rely on.

Why Do People Choose Magnesium Citrate Tablets?

Magnesium citrate is a popular supplement, and people choose to include it as part of their overall health regimen for the following reasons:

Energy Levels

As a result of its role in energy-yielding metabolism, magnesium citrate is commonly used by customers who have an increased demand for energy, such as athletes or those who regularly exercise at a high intensity.

Tiredness and Fatigue

Signs of a magnesium deficiency include tiredness and fatigue, and a magnesium citrate supplement can help avoid these symptoms by supporting an individual in regularly achieving an adequate intake of magnesium.

Bone and Muscle Health

Around sixty percent of the magnesium found in the body is stored in the skeleton, where the mineral is an important component of healthy bones. Magnesium also has a role in protein metabolism and the maintenance of normal muscle function.

Psychological Wellbeing

Magnesium contributes to normal psychological function and the normal functioning of the nervous system. A deficiency of magnesium can lead to feelings of a low mood and exhaustion, which helps to account for why magnesium citrate is a popular choice among those who live a hectic or stressful life.

Why Choose Simply Supplements Magnesium Citrate 700mg?

The bioavailability of magnesium varies, depending on the food source or form of the compound. The nutritionists at Simply Supplements opted to add Magnesium Citrate tablets to our product range, to ensure that our customers have access to the most absorbable form of the mineral.

Rigorous quality control methods, such as chemical analysis and disintegration tests, ensure that the purity, activity and structural integrity of every tablet are preserved during storage and transportation, allowing for the consistent delivery of the stated dosage.

title: Magnesium Tablets 200mg
body_html:
What is Magnesium?

Magnesium is one of the most abundant minerals in the body after calcium. Around 60% of it is stored in the bones and works in combination with calcium to maintain density and strength in bones and teeth. Magnesium is responsible for over 300 different processes in the body, playing a vitally important role in the maintenance of muscle function. Many experts believe that due to magnesium's benefit on human psychology, increasing daily intakes of magnesium can help reduce feelings of tiredness and fatigue.

The Importance of Healthy Muscle Function

Magnesium is not naturally produced in the body, despite its abundance. Therefore, it must be obtained through food or supplements. Magnesium deficiencies could result in muscle and bone degradation and damage, so it is incredibly important to keep up healthy levels of magnesium at all times. Many people choose magnesium supplements due to the regimented and easy-to-take nature of ingestion, as well as the sheer level of nutritional quality present in our magnesium tablets.

One of the key functions of magnesium is healthy muscle function and contraction. This especially applies to the heart, which many forget is made of muscle. Magnesium also helps to balance electrolytes in the body, which are essential for normal muscle contraction. Electrolyte imbalances in the body could also lead to painful muscle cramps or lethargy, motivating more people to incorporate magnesium into their diet.

Who Should Take Magnesium Tablets?

Magnesium 200mg tablets are perfect for providing daily nutritional support to customers looking to maintain the strength of their bones and muscles. Age is a considerable factor that may negatively impact magnesium and calcium levels in the body. This could affect a person's quality of life, and needs to be taken care of to ensure no long-term health problems arise. Our magnesium 200mg tablets may be able to offer that continued support when coupled with a healthy lifestyle and regular exercise.

Only the Finest Ingredients for Our Customers

Since magnesium is not produced in the body, the supplements you choose to use for your source of this vitally important mineral need to be outstanding. That is why we're dedicated to providing the best quality magnesium on the market by sourcing our ingredients from industry-leading suppliers. Before manufacturing begins on our Magnesium 200mg tablets, all of the ingredients are thoroughly inspected to ensure only the purest and highest-quality samples are used. Our Magnesium 200mg tablets are manufactured by our suppliers in accordance with the standards and regulations highlighted by the Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP).

Magnesium also plays a pivotal role in maintaining healthy bones and teeth, as well as supporting electrolyte balance, which is vital for hydration and overall bodily function.

title: Maqui Berry Tablets 6,000mg
body_html:
What is a Maqui Berry?

Maqui berries are small, deep purple berries that grow naturally in Chile and Argentina. Maqui berries are known for their impressive natural composition. Maqui berries possess some of the highest ORAC (Oxygen Radical Absorbance Capacity) values of any fruit, often as much as four times more than blueberries. A high ORAC value indicates that a food has strong antioxidant capacity. Due to their taste and tartness, however, the natural properties of maqui berries are commonly enjoyed in supplement form.

High-Quality Ingredients in Every Maqui Berry Tablet

Simply Supplements has gone to the source of the best maqui berries on the planet for the ingredients that are featured in these tablets. Each and every Maqui berry used is handpicked by local communities deep in the heart of the Chilean rainforests to ensure the sustainability of these fantastic little fruits is never jeopardised by popular demand. By harvesting in this way, local experts are able to choose the very best berries to be passed on to manufacturing, decreasing the amount of berries that would be wasted were more careless methods used.

Maqui berries can be difficult to find because the fruit ripens and spoils quickly, so they need to be processed soon after harvesting. Simply Supplements works with the best suppliers in the industry who have perfected the art of harvesting and shipping the ingredients without losing any nutritional value.

Manufactured in the UK Using State-Of-The-Art Equipment

Once the maqui berries have been inspected and sampled, they are washed and distilled to help amplify the quality contained within the ingredients. To help protect the exclusive formula of ingredients in this supplement, highly-experienced professionals are present at every stage of the manufacturing process. They perform stringent tests and inspections to ensure the purity of the tablets is never compromised. Simply Supplements Maqui Berry tablets are foil-sealed to lock in freshness before being shipped.

Thanks to the quality control efforts used by Simply Supplements, all products have been manufactured to strict Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) standards. All Simply Supplements products are manufactured in the UK to strict EU standards.

title: Max Strength Milk Thistle | THR
body_html:
Milk thistle is an annual or biennial plant with bright purple flowers. Unlike more commonly seen members of the thistle family, milk thistle is able to grow to 3 metres in height under ideal conditions.

To turn milk thistle into a supplement, the fruits are harvested, passed through an extraction process, and the resultant material is then standardised and dried to provide a reliable, consistent dose every time.

Why Take Milk Thistle?

Customers have been benefiting from our milk thistle supplements for years. This traditional herbal remedy has historically been used to relieve the symptoms associated with occasional over-indulgence of food and drink.

Milk thistle has most commonly been used to aid upset stomachs and cases of indigestion. For obvious reasons it tends to be particularly popular around social events such as Christmas and Easter, when many of us let our hair down and perhaps eat rather more than we normally would.

This new formulation, however, represents the next evolution in our supplement range; our most potent milk thistle product yet.

Click here to read the patient information leaflet.

Super Strength Formula

It is believed by many that the beneficial effects of milk thistle are the result of an active ingredient known as "silymarin".

This new maximum strength formulation contains almost 60% more silymarin than previous products in our range for maximum impact each time.

Traditional Herbal Remedies Explained

Traditional Herbal Remedies are a specific group of supplements, tightly monitored by the Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA). All herbal remedies like our maximum strength milk thistle must pass through a rigorous assessment process, before gaining formal approval to sell within the UK.

We are pleased to report that this milk thistle supplement has successfully met these exacting requirements, helping to underline the quality of this product when compared to some others found on the market.

title: Menopause Test - SELFCheck
body_html:
The menopause can be a difficult time for many women, so it can be reassuring to gain clarity on what is happening within your body. This menopause home test kit offers a simple and effective way to measure hormone levels in the body and assess whether or not you have passed through the menopausal transition.

The Science Behind the Test

The onset of the menopause can lead to a wide variety of biological changes, not to mention potential symptoms. However, one of the most reliable indicators of menopausal change involves a hormone known as Follicle Stimulating Hormone or FSH. This hormone plays a central role in the operation of the ovaries, and as a result FSH levels can be far higher after the menopause than before.

Using a simple urine test, this menopause home test kit measures levels of FSH in the body, providing a straightforward colour-coded result.

Results from the Comfort of Your Own Home

It's not always easy to discuss the menopause, especially if you're unlucky enough to experience it at a younger age than many other women.

The benefit of a home testing kit like this one is being able to use it from the comfort and privacy of your own home, and to get clear results within just 10 minutes. This menopause home test kit may be used at any time of day, but it is recommended that an early morning sample is used.

Depending on the result, you may then consider seeking further support from a trusted medical professional, who should be able to offer guidance on minimising any unpleasant menopause symptoms.

Pleasantly, once used, the kit can be safely and legally disposed of in your normal household waste permitting additional discretion.

title: Phosphatidyl Serine Complex
body_html:
What is Phosphatidylserine?

Phosphatidylserine is a phospholipid that can be found in the myelin sheath of nerve cells. The myelin sheath is a fatty substance that surrounds portions of the nerve cells called axons, which help transport electrical signals throughout the brain. The myelin sheath acts as an insulator along the length of the cell to help with the transportation of these signals.

Added Ginkgo Biloba and Korean Ginseng

The nutritionists at Simply Supplements have added ginkgo biloba and Korean ginseng to this supplement, two ingredients which have both been used for centuries in herbal formulas. Korean ginseng is a plant that is native to areas of eastern Asia, like China, Korea and Bhutan. Recorded use of Korean ginseng dates back to the 16th century. Ginkgo Biloba is one of the oldest species of tree around, believed to be older than 200 million years. Ginkgo Biloba is also native to areas of Asia like China, where extracts were used in traditional remedies. Today, however, both are popularly ingested orally as ingredients in a variety of dietary supplements.

Why Choose Phosphatidyl Serine?

Simply Supplements phosphatidylserine tablets offer you a perfect combination of three different, high-quality ingredients. All Simply Supplements products are manufactured to GMP and EU standards in the UK, utilising a manufacturing process that includes state-of-the-art machinery at some of the best facilities in the country. Highly skilled, fully trained professionals with decades of experience creating supplements bring Simply Supplements Phosphatidylserine Complex tablets to life. The tablets, which are formulated by an expert team of resident nutritionists, undergo stringent sampling and testing to ensure the three herbal ingredients present in these phosphatidylserine tablets provide the best support possible for Simply Supplements customers.

These phosphatidylserine tablets contain standardised extracts of ginkgo and ginseng. title: Prostate Health Test - SELFCheck
body_html:
It can be difficult to assess the health of your prostate. However, in many cases, the sooner that issues are detected, the more effective the treatment is likely to be.

While prostate problems tend to become more common with age, they can still affect younger men in some instances.

This prostate health home test kit is a quick and simple way to check for specific markers known to be associated with an enlarged prostate gland and inflammation and may even serve as an early indicator of prostate cancer, currently the number one cancer in men aged 50 and over.

The Science Behind the Test

This home test kit measures Prostate Specific Antigen (PSA). PSA is a protein that is produced by cells of the prostate gland, but the levels produced by healthy cells normally fall within a recognised range. Higher-than-normal PSA levels are recognised as a sign of potential prostate issues, which then warrants further, more detailed investigation by a medical professional.

Home Testing for Privacy & Discretion

Discussing potential prostate problems isn't always easy. As a result, a PSA home test kit can be a quick, cost-effective and discreet way to check your prostate health.

This test kit can also be an excellent way of monitoring an organ that often shows no signs of distress. Used as part of your routine health check, you'll be ideally-positioned to identify any abnormal PSA levels and to seek appropriate advice in good time.

Results in Minutes

This simple finger-prick test includes everything necessary apart from a watch to monitor time. Simply draw a drop of blood using the included sterile lancet, place it onto the test cassette and wait exactly 10 minutes for the lines to appear. The results are clear and easy to interpret. After testing, the whole PSA home test kit can be safely disposed of in your household waste.

title: Rosemary Essential Oil
body_html:
Rosemary has been used for centuries for its strong flavour in cooking and its rich, woody scent. Rosemary is a perennial plant of Mediterranean origin that favours dry, sunny locations, but is now grown successfully even in temperate regions like the UK.

There are a number of recognised varieties of rosemary. The rosemary used to produce our rosemary essential oil is Rosmarinus officinalis. Just as importantly, we use the camphor chemotype. The term "chemotype" was first coined in 1968 to describe different strains of plants that look physically identical yet differ significantly in their chemical makeup.

We use Rosmarinus officinalis ct. Camphor because as the name suggests it boasts superior camphor levels. Camphor has a particularly strong aroma, having been used in everything from skin rubs to clear the head through to natural insect repellents. It even features as a key ingredient in one of the earliest-known ice cream recipes.

Our rosemary essential oil is extracted from rosemary shrubs grown under optimal conditions in Spain. The leaves, flowers and stems are subjected to steam distillation, before the oil is refined, tested and then bottled for transportation.

Lecithin can also be found in every cell of the human body as it is a component of cell membranes. For this reason it has grown in popularity in recent years, with many people consuming lecithin on a daily basis.

Originally native to Europe and Asia, St John's Wort is a plant with the Latin name of Hypericum perforatum. It has a bare trunk and beautiful star-shaped yellow flowers and is now found all over the world in temperate locations. It is considered by many to be an unwanted weed, but despite its reputation as an invasive species, St John's Wort has a long history of being used in a therapeutic capacity, and modern extraction methods have allowed for its benefits to be concentrated into convenient tablet form.

How Can St John's Wort Tablets Help?

As a Traditional Herbal Remedy, St John's Wort has been used to treat a range of issues. However, the most famous role of St John's Wort is a solution to a slightly low mood and mild anxiety, and it has been traditionally used to tackle these disorders for decades.

  • Mood-boosting activity - The active ingredient in St John's Wort is hypericin, and this compound is thought to have the ability to raise a slightly low mood
  • Anxiety – St John's Wort is thought to have anxiolytic and sedative actions, which can benefit people suffering from the occasional bout of mild anxiety or stress

Why Choose Simply Supplements St John's Wort?

Simply Supplements MoodBoost St John's Wort has been formulated using pharmaceutical-grade ingredients and is manufactured by expert suppliers, to meet stringent EU regulations so that a superior level of efficacy and product quality is always maintained.

In the absence of an independent body that checks the quality and safety of the herbal remedies that are available in the UK, the registration of Simply Supplements MoodBoost St John's Wort under the THR scheme should provide you with peace of mind. It has been assessed by the Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA), and has been shown to meet the required standard of safety, and provides reliable patient information. The THR number is given on the packaging, and this provides evidence that the product, and the accompanying information, meet the MHRA's strict criteria.

title: Stomach Ulcer Test - SELFCheck
body_html:
Helicobacter pylori is a bacterium often found in the gut. While not every infection causes symptoms, there are cases where a serious infection may be linked to stomach ulcers or, in extreme cases, stomach cancer.

This home test kit is therefore ideal for those customers who experience digestive issues such as discomfort or tenderness during or soon after eating. It provides a quick and simple way to confirm or rule out an unpleasant H. pylori infection. Furthermore, once a confirmed diagnosis has been made, treating the cause of that discomfort becomes much easier indeed.

The Science Behind the Test

As with so many other bacteria and viruses, your immune system can be incredibly effective at mounting an attack against H. pylori. Within the confines of the digestive system, however, it can be more challenging for your body to rid itself of such infections.

This Helicobacter pylori home test kit is designed and manufactured here in the UK, and measures specific antibodies produced by your immune system in the battle against the bacteria. Higher antibody levels are likely to reflect a higher bacterial load and therefore an ongoing infection.

Results from the Privacy of Your Own Home

If you think you may be suffering from a stomach ulcer, then this Helicobacter pylori home test kit is probably the easiest and most discreet option around. Simply use the (included) sterile lancet to draw a drop of blood, place it onto the test strip and wait for the colours to appear.

Please note that if you have previously been treated for an infection of H. pylori, then positive results may still show for up to 12 months after the infection was beaten.

Once finished, the entire kit can be disposed of in your normal household waste.

To address this common shortfall of competing products, we have added a rich source of fibre known as inulin to our strawberry whey protein powder. As a result, adding inulin to our protein powder helps it to pass more gently through the gut, limiting the digestive issues experienced by some individuals.

What is Vitamin B?

Vitamin B consists of eight different vitamins, which makes it unique from other vitamins. Each individual B vitamin plays an important and specific role in the body. When combined together, they are referred to as vitamin B complex supplements, and offer a comprehensive formula for general health and wellbeing.

Nervous System: B vitamins act as coenzymes to help support a healthy nervous system.

Brain Function and Energy Levels: The B vitamins contribute to the maintenance of healthy neurological and psychological function. They can help to balance energy levels and reduce feelings of tiredness and fatigue.

Heart Health and Homocysteine Levels: Vitamin B1 is known to contribute to heart health. Numerous B vitamins also help to regulate healthy homocysteine levels.

Vision and Skin: Vitamin B2 is known to contribute to the maintenance of healthy eyes and vision. B2 also protects collagen from damage and therefore supports the appearance of healthy skin.

The above health claims have been authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

title: Super Zinc Plus
body_html:
The Importance of Zinc

Zinc is an essential trace mineral, with a spectrum of metabolic roles so broad that it is often considered to be one of the most versatile of all nutrients. It is present in a range of foods that commonly occur in the diet, but mild to moderate insufficiency of this vital mineral is widespread. Signs of a sub-optimal zinc status include impaired immunity, cognitive dysfunction, a lack of energy and problems with the hair, skin and nails.

Immune Support

Zinc is known to contribute to the normal functioning of the immune system, and is a common feature of supplement regimes that are designed to support seasonal defences. If you feel that, despite your best efforts, you are still prone to catching colds and other infections, zinc could be the supplement you need.

Mental Performance

Zinc has a fundamental role in the maintenance of normal cognitive function, and signs of zinc deficiency can include mental lethargy and an inability to concentrate. Supplements are an effective method of ensuring an adequate intake, and can help bring levels in the body back to within the normal range.

Muscle Function and Energy Production

Zinc is needed for the normal synthesis of protein, and so is an important nutrient for the maintenance and repair of muscle tissue. It is also involved in the metabolism of carbohydrates, which usually form the major source of energy in a balanced diet. These factors account for why a zinc supplement is a suitable choice for athletes and exercise enthusiasts.

Fertility and Reproduction

The production of the male sex hormone, testosterone, is dependent on an adequate intake of zinc, and this helps explain why zinc is understood to contribute to normal male fertility. This makes it an important nutrient for men who are focused on maintaining healthy reproductive function.

Healthy Hair, Skin and Nails

Zinc supports the maintenance of the health of the hair, skin and nails, and falling hair, brittle nails and problems with the skin are often associated with a deficiency of zinc. Both women and men who are concerned about the condition of the hair, skin and nails may benefit from a zinc supplement.

All of the above health claims have been authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

Vegetarian-Friendly and Highly Absorbable Zinc Supplement

The bioavailability of the zinc found in the diets of vegetarians is generally lower than that found in animal foods. Super Zinc Plus provides a viable solution to meeting the zinc requirements of those who avoid meat.

There are a variety of different zinc supplements on the market, but during the development of Super Zinc Plus 25mg, the nutritionists at Simply Supplements opted to use zinc citrate, which is widely regarded as being the most absorbable form of the mineral.

Uniform Quality and Potency in Every Capsule

Based in the UK, our state of the art manufacturing facility allows us to produce premium-quality supplements while keeping overheads to a minimum, resulting in outstanding value for the customer. Rigorous quality control methods, such as chemical analysis and disintegration tests, ensure that the activity and structural integrity of every capsule is preserved during storage and transportation, allowing for the consistent delivery of the stated dosage.

title: Tea Tree Essential Oil
body_html:
Tea tree is one of the most ubiquitous essential oils, having been used in all manner of natural cosmetic blends over the years. The warm, fresh aroma with spicy undertones is possibly one of the most instantly recognisable of all the essential oils.

The tea tree is also known by the botanical name of Melaleuca alternifolia. It is native to Australia, where it grows alongside streams, reaching up to 20 feet in height.

Tea tree leaves are rich in aromatic oils. Tea tree essential oil, typically has a high camphor content, meaning it can be useful for helping to clear a stuffy head when inhaled. It is also believed by some people to have antiseptic properties, hence its use in many soaps and skin lotions.

To extract the delicate tea tree essential oil the leaves are harvested, before being allowed to dry for a few days in the sun. This helps to concentrate the oil content. The leaves then undergo steam distillation, before the resultant oil is purified, tested and bottled.

title: Thyroid (TSH) Test - SELFCheck
body_html:
An underactive thyroid can have so many physical symptoms, from unexplained weight gain to feelings of lethargy and an inability to warm up. Sadder yet, thyroid issues are surprisingly common, especially among women. However, now it's easier than ever to check your thyroid health, thanks to this simple-to-use home test kit.

Results from the Comfort of Your Own Home

Many of us believe deep down that we may be suffering from thyroid problems. Getting a proper diagnosis, however, isn't always easy. This thyroid home test kit removes all the inconvenience in one go.

All it takes is one drop of blood from your finger - easy with the included lancet. Place the sample into the test strip, wait just 10 minutes and read off the result.

This thyroid home test kit is therefore perfect for anyone leading a busy life and struggling to find the time to visit their doctor, or people who would rather do a test in the privacy and seclusion of their own home.

After completing the test, all the equipment can simply be disposed of safely in your household waste - there's no need to take it to the hospital for incineration.

The Science Behind the Test

This thyroid home test kit measures levels of a hormone known as "thyroid stimulating hormone". As the name suggests, TSH controls the activity level of your thyroid. In cases where your thyroid is underactive, typically levels of TSH in the blood are much higher. This is because the pituitary gland in the brain that produces it is working extra hard, after noticing that the messages it's sending don't seem to be having the required effect.

The test is therefore quite clear and easy to assess with a home test kit, and this particular kit has been specially chosen as it is so simple to interpret the results in the comfort of your own home.

title: Urine Infection Test - SELFCheck
body_html:
Urinary tract infections are surprisingly common, with many sufferers experiencing unpleasant symptoms such as pain or a burning sensation when visiting the toilet or the need to visit the toilet more often than normal. Fortunately, once diagnosed, there are a number of effective treatment options available.

Of course, the first step is confirming whether the symptoms you're experiencing are indeed from such an infection, and that's where this home urine infection test kit comes into its own.

Test in the Privacy of Your Own Home

Health conditions like urinary tract infections aren't always easy to discuss with others. Being able to carry out a test from the comfort and privacy of your own home is therefore an appealing option for many people.

Results appear fast with this urine infection home test kit, within just 2 minutes you'll have an answer. There is no need to send the sample off in order to receive your results. The whole kit can then be discreetly disposed of afterwards in your normal household waste.

How the Home Test Kit Works

This urinary tract infection home test kit looks for three different substances in your urine. Namely, these are protein, leukocytes and nitrite. While these substances are very rarely found in normal urine, they are known biomarkers for individuals suffering from urinary infections.

Using the test kit is very simple indeed. Start by collecting a small sample. There's no need to control fluid or food intake before taking a test. Furthermore, the test can be done at any time of day, though the manufacturer recommends collecting the sample first thing in the morning for maximum accuracy.

The included colour match chart produces easy-to-interpret results within minutes.

Each box includes two identical urine infection home tests.

title: Vegan Protein Powder
body_html:
Complete Protein

Plant-based diets are becoming increasingly popular, with the Vegan Society estimating that there were over half a million vegans in the UK in 2016. Although vegan diets can provide sufficient amounts of most essential nutrients, certain ones pose a challenge. One of these is protein, which is needed for growth and repair.

However, there are certain foods which complement each other to provide a relevant amount of the essential proteins. Because of this, we have expertly combined pea, hemp and pumpkin seed protein to provide a complete protein source for consumers. Each serving provides more than 23g of protein and 4g of branched-chain amino acids for potent dietary support*.

Who is SimplyGo Vegan Protein Powder Suitable For?

This innovative and advanced formula is obviously popular with vegetarians and vegans. However, a surprising amount of meat-eaters now use plant-based protein powders. This is for various reasons, but many people struggle with the lactose content of dairy proteins such as casein and whey as they find that it leads to bloating and gas.

Vitamin B6 is a versatile and well-understood nutrient with a range of roles in the body.  According to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), vitamin B6 contributes to the maintenance of the following bodily functions:

  • Nervous system

title: Vitamin D2 Tablets 2,000iu
body_html:
The Importance of Vitamin D

Vitamin D is perhaps best known for its role in maintaining healthy bones, but it also performs a wide variety of other functions in the body. We have the ability to make vitamin D for ourselves, but the synthesis that occurs in the skin is dependent on the availability of sunlight. It is known that blood concentrations of vitamin D in the UK fluctuate in line with the seasons, with levels being lowest in winter and highest in summer.

It used to be considered that skin synthesis of vitamin D in the summer would be enough to cover requirements during the winter, but this is no longer the case, and the government recommends that everyone should consider taking a vitamin D supplement. Although vitamin D is found in certain foods, dietary sources of vitamin D are relatively limited, and when you consider that it is primarily found in red meat, liver and oily fish, it is easy to see why maintaining an adequate intake of this important nutrient often poses a challenge for vegetarians and vegans.

Functions of Vitamin D

Vitamin D is perhaps best known for its role in calcium absorption and bone health, but it also has a range of other important functions, including supporting the growth of healthy cells, the maintenance of a healthy immune system, and the facilitation of normal nerve and muscle function. It has also been demonstrated that vitamin D helps to reduce the risk of falling associated with postural instability and muscle weakness. Falling is a risk factor for bone fractures among men and women 60 years of age and older.

Who Should Take Vitamin D2 2000iu?

This product is an ideal vitamin D supplement for vegetarians and vegans, but is a suitable solution for anyone who would prefer to meet their vitamin D requirements from a plant-based source. Other population groups who are at a particular risk of vitamin D deficiency include people with darker skin, people who spend a lot of time indoors during the day and people who cover their skin all of the time. It is also worth noting that, as we age, our skin becomes thinner, meaning that we can't produce as much vitamin D as younger people.

title: Vitamin K2 Tablets 100mcg
body_html:
The Benefits of a Vitamin K Supplement

Vitamin K2 has several functions in the body, but food sources are somewhat limited, and foods that are rich in this important nutrient have a relatively low presence in the typical Western diet. Humans have the ability to convert vitamin K1 into vitamin K2, but this is a metabolically inefficient process. Certain beneficial bacteria that naturally reside in the human digestive system synthesise vitamin K2, but the use of antibiotics and an imbalance in the microflora of the gut can disrupt the body's ability to manufacture vitamin K2 for itself.

Simply Supplements Vitamin K2 provides a reliable and convenient source of vitamin K2, helping to ensure an adequate intake. Current advice on vitamin K requirements for adults is to maintain a daily intake of 1mcg per kilogram of bodyweight, and this product easily fulfils this criteria.

Why Should I Take Vitamin K Tablets?

Vitamin K2 has a number of established functions in the human body. According to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), vitamin K2 can provide the following benefits:

Bone Health

Vitamin K makes a well-established contribution to the maintenance of normal bones. It works in combination with calcium, facilitating its transportation to the skeleton and entry into the bone mass to help build and strengthen bones.

Blood Clotting

Vitamin K also contributes to the process of normal blood clotting. It is understood that the metabolism of a number of proteins involved in blood coagulation is dependent on vitamin K. A classic symptom of vitamin K deficiency is an increased risk of excessive bleeding.

Why Choose Vitamin K Tablets?

While there are several different types of vitamin K tablets on the market, the most proven and bioavailable form is K2. Vitamin K2 is a fat-soluble vitamin, and, just like all fat-soluble vitamins, it is normally susceptible to degradation. However, Vitamin K2 100mcg features an advanced formula that has been developed to be stable as well as bioavailable, so that its potency is not lost in storage. Each high-strength tablet is made in the UK under GMP approved conditions, and strict quality control procedures ensure that no tablet exhibits any characteristics of capping or lamentation.

title: VitaPaws Complete for Dogs
body_html:
Micronutrient Support for Dogs

Like every member of the animal kingdom, dogs rely on correct nutrition to maintain a good state of health. Different dietary components have different roles within the body and many of these nutrients are considered vital to canine health. As dogs do not have the ability to synthesise these essential nutrients for themselves, they must obtain them from the diet.

VitaPaws™ Complete for Dogs is an advanced multi-nutrient supplement that has been expertly formulated to support the health of your dog. Each sprinkle capsule provides a broad spectrum of vitamins, minerals and amino acids to help give you the peace of mind that your dog's micronutrient requirements are being met, helping them to enjoy optimal health and a good quality of life.

B Vitamins

The B vitamins provided by VitaPaws™ Complete for Dogs allow for the proper utilisation of proteins, carbohydrates and fats supplied by the diet, facilitating the release of energy from food, and the synthesis and maintenance of tissues.

Skin and Coat Health

The addition of the fat-soluble vitamins vitamin A and vitamin E helps to ensure that VitaPaws Complete for Dogs provides the nutrients that a dog needs to maintain the health of the skin. This supplement also includes biotin and essential fatty acids to help maintain the appearance of a healthy coat.

title: VitaPaws Complete for Senior Dogs
body_html:
Micronutrient Support for Senior Dogs

The process of ageing is a developmental inevitability for dogs, just as much as it is for people. The physiological effects of getting older include changes in the functional capacity of the vital organs, and a decline in the efficiency of digestive and metabolic processes.

A dog's nutrition has a significant influence on their lifespan, and optimal nutritional practices can have a role in reducing their risk of developing a range of age-related conditions. VitaPaws™ Complete for Senior Dogs has been specifically formulated to meet the needs of ageing dogs, supporting their health, vitality and quality of life.

Comprehensive and Tailored Support

VitaPaws™ Complete for Senior Dogs provides an optimal blend of active ingredients to satisfy the unique nutritional requirements of a senior dog. The innovative formula includes vitamins, minerals, amino acids and a range of other beneficial compounds to provide comprehensive support.

Joint Health

Changes to the musculoskeletal system that occur as a dog ages lead to an increased risk of developing problems of the joints. VitaPaws™ Complete for Senior Dogs provides glucosamine to support the maintenance of joint cartilage.

title: Ylang Ylang Essential Oil
body_html:
Ylang ylang essential oil is extracted from the flowers of the Cananga tree. The scent has been described as sweet, musky and floral. Ylang ylang has developed a central role in the perfume industry, being used in all manner of fragrances around the world. It is even sometimes known as the perfume tree. Indeed, even the botanical name of the plant hints at its incredible aroma - Cananga odorata.

Cananga odorata is native to much of Southeast Asia, growing naturally in areas such as Malaysia and Indonesia, and across to the tropical parts of Australia. The name ylang ylang is derived from the Indonesian word for "wilderness", which helps to explain how it naturally grows.

Despite the huge area over which it grows there is one part of the world that has really cornered the ylang ylang market. That area is the Comoros, off the eastern coast of Africa.

It has been estimated that over 80% of the ylang ylang produced worldwide comes from the Comoros islands. The climate here is ideal for ylang ylang production, with mild, tropical weather and very little in the way of cyclones that can plague other nearby areas.

Unsurprisingly our ylang ylang is also sourced from the Comoros. Crucially, however, our manufacturing partner is Sedex-registered. Sedex is a global organisation that ensures ethical trade and sustainable practices. You can feel confident, therefore, that our ylang ylang essential oil has been produced to the very highest standards possible.
